reviews.title: The beginning of the trip with the accommodation is really not good.
reviews.text: This time, while planning a trip to Phu Quoc, which many Koreans visit, with a friend's family, I booked 2 nights in the north and 2 nights in the south. In the north, we chose a guesthouse as our accommodation, but upon arrival, we were informed that due to many reservations, there was a problem in the system, and our accommodation was changed unilaterally to a different place. We were not satisfied with any aspect from the location of the accommodation to the room conditions and service, and the start of our trip was completely ruined by the accommodation. We tried to make the best of it since we were already there, but the hygiene was extremely poor, and although we requested a change of water and towels during our 2-night stay, nothing happened until the moment we checked out. After having this experience with my first guesthouse stay, I do not want to use it again.
reviews.response:
SUNGHWAN thân mến!
Trước hết, cảm ơn gia đình bạn đã ghé thăm căn nhà cạnh biển của chúng tôi. Chúng tôi phải thừa nhận rằng, chúng tôi đã rất buồn khi đọc được những đánh giá và góp ý thẳng thắn của bạn. Chúng tôi không muốn bào chữa cho những thiếu sót đó, và chúng tôi hoàn toàn chịu trách nhiệm khi đã khiến bạn có một trải nghiệm không tốt tại chỗ nghỉ của chúng tôi. Chúng tôi thấu hiểu được sự thất vọng của bạn. 
Trong những sự cố về hệ thống đặt phòng của chúng tôi quá tải và dịch vụ còn nhiều thiếu sót, chúng tôi đã cố gắng bù đắp cho bạn bằng cách hoàn lại tiền và tặng gia đình bạn những trái xoài ngon nhất mà chúng tôi đã lựa chọn rất cẩn thận, tuy nhiên, những điều đó vẫn chưa thể xoa dịu những sự không hài lòng của bạn về dịch vụ của chúng tôi. Có thể sau lần này, chúng tôi sẽ học thêm tiếng Hàn để có thể giao tiếp tốt hơn cũng như có thể phục vụ các bạn tốt hơn nữa. Để đó không còn là rào cản ngôn ngữ giữa chúng ta nữa.
Chúng tôi mong rằng bạn có thể thông cảm vì sự quá tải

reviews.title: Good location!
reviews.positives:
Location is closed to shops and entertainment areas. Also about 300m to the beach. Staffs are friendly and helpful.

You can't find the house by yourself as no exact address, if communication is not good then you will be on your own. We lucky the driver knew the location. However, We were so pannic after a while can't contact the owner.
reviews.negatives: After showering water will be everywhere which make very slippery in the bathroom due to open shower.

reviews.title: It’s a nice
reviews.text: It was nice to come with a lot of friends, there was a lot of room. We had a kitchen to cook our own meals, and it was close to the sea, which was nice.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Near the Grand area, it's comfortable to go out at night. The cost of the electric vehicle is cheap. The beach is beautiful. The accommodation is clean. The host is friendly.

reviews.title: 設備不完善
reviews.text: 房間不整潔，客廳不舒適，樓層太高要上樓梯

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Мы -две семьи в детьми останавливались на несколько дней . Близко  с одной стороны к прекрасному пляжу , и в другую сторону к центру с магазинами , ресторанами и бесплатному ежедневному шоу .
В комнатах все хорошо. 
Пожелала бы хозяину сделать более комфортной и уютной  общую зону  на первом этаже и обустроить кухню ( отмыть стены, поставить нормальный стол, предоставить кухонные приборы  и посуду) . Поставить стиральную машину

reviews.title: Beware
reviews.text: Switch and bait cant find the add. And tells me ranout of room and want me to relocate
reviews.response:
Dear Michael!

First of all, we would like to sincerely thank you for trusting and choosing Robins Homestay for our trip. We are truly sorry for the inconvenience you have experienced due to the confusion in the reservation, caused by the overload of our booking system.

We have tried to support you in the best way, but unfortunately we did not meet your expectations. We would like to assure you that we have taken necessary measures to prevent this incident from happening in the future.

Regarding your reservation, we have made a free cancellation at your request. Once again, we would like to send you our sincerest apologies for this inconvenience and thank you for giving us the opportunity to serve you.

Best Regards!
Robins Homestay.
